questions.question: Given a self-balancing binary search tree, describe the property that ensures the height of the tree remains relatively small even after insertion or deletion of a node. (5 marks)
What is the time complexity of heapify operation in a binary heap? (5 marks)
Explain the difference between 'heap' and 'heap data structure' in the context of the Transform-and-Conquer: Balanced Search Trees, Heaps and Heapsort module. (5 marks)
questions.hint: A data structure representing a binary heap, vs a collection of data that can be represented by a binary heap
